message:
fix(codegen): correct INSERT column-list mapping to table schema order

Both planner and VDBE codegen paths now properly map INSERT column lists
to target table column positions, filling unmentioned columns with
defaults. Previously the VDBE path pre-expanded rows inline; now both
paths use a source-register-to-target-register Copy approach that avoids
cloning expression trees and handles INSERT...SELECT correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
